text: Inside this modern, angular space, I feel a sense of curiosity and slight bewilderment. The colored lights and reflective glass pique my interest, drawing me toward the heart of the room. Confronted by bold 'R+D' signage and digital screens, I am prompted to reflect on the interplay of clarity and confusion in perception. I feel present and engaged, yet also somewhat disoriented—aware of how easily focus can slip away in such an environment of innovation and abstraction. It is both inspiring and humbling to stand at the intersection of research and experience.
